name: Anjouan (Comoros)

colors.symbolism: the crescent and the four stars

description: A red field bearing a white crescent and four white five-pointed stars arranged vertically, echoing the crescent and four stars of the Comoros.
history: Anjouan (Ndzuwani) is one of the three autonomous islands of the Union of the Comoros. Its flag places the white crescent and four stars - the historic symbols of the Comoro archipelago - on a red field.

features.role: four stars for the islands of the Comoros
